all particles regardless of spin statistics
only electrons in atomic orbitals exclusively
exceed the speed of light in vacuum

violate energy conservation temporarily

any arbitrary rotation angle whatsoever

energy eigenvalue of the state measured

lowering temperature toward absolute zero
adding more identical particles to system
